---
title: "Pi Bio Quarto engine"
engine: pi-bio
---

# Trusted Node/TypeScript cells

The engine keeps cells in one Node process for this document. `piBio` is a
small output adapter; scientific work still goes through the pi-bio-agent SDK
or CLI and its host-provided capabilities.

```{ts .pi-bio}
import { summarizeTotal } from "./helper.ts";

const values: number[] = [1, 2, 3, 4];
const total = values.reduce((sum, value) => sum + value, 0);
console.log({ total, mean: total / values.length });
console.log(summarizeTotal(total));
```

```{ts .pi-bio}
const doubled = values.map((value) => value * 2);
piBio.json({ values, doubled, largeCount: 9007199254740993n });
console.log("user-output-preserved");
```

```{r .pi-bio}
cat("R is an explicit host runtime")
```

```{bash .pi-bio}
printf 'shell is an explicit host runtime\\n'
```

```{ts .pi-bio}
import { runBioQueryFromManifest } from "pi-bio-agent";

const query = await runBioQueryFromManifest({
  cwd: ".",
  dbPath: ":memory:",
  manifestPath: "examples/manifest.json",
  runId: "quarto-engine-sdk",
  sql: "SELECT consequence, count(*) AS n FROM variants GROUP BY consequence ORDER BY consequence",
});
if (!query.ok) throw new Error(query.error);
piBio.json(query.result.rows);
```

`pi-bio` cells run with the permissions of the Node process that renders the
document. They are trusted code, not a sandbox.
